# 📚 Welcome to the Velnora Website Management Hub

**Hello! You're in the right place to manage your website without coding.**

---

## 📖 Where to Start?

### 🆕 **First Time Here?**
👉 Read: **[QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md)** (5 minutes)  
Quick commands and important links

### 📚 **Need Detailed Instructions?**
👉 Read: **[INSTRUCTIONS.md](INSTRUCTIONS.md)** (20 minutes)  
Complete guide for every task you might want to do

### 🚀 **Want to Deploy Your Website?**
👉 Read: **[/workflows/deploy.yml](workflows/deploy.yml)**  
Auto-deployment settings (already configured, no changes needed)

## 🎯 Common Tasks

**All these are explained in [INSTRUCTIONS.md](INSTRUCTIONS.md):**

| Task | Time | Difficulty |
|------|------|------------|
| Edit a blog article | 2 min | ⭐ Very Easy |
| Add a new blog post | 5 min | ⭐ Very Easy |
| Add/edit AI prompts | 3 min | ⭐ Very Easy |
| Setup contact form | 10 min | ⭐⭐ Easy |
| Setup Google Analytics | 10 min | ⭐⭐ Easy |
| Setup domain (velnoraai.com) | 5 min + 48h wait | ⭐⭐ Easy |
| Create new page | 15 min | ⭐⭐ Easy |

## ❓ What's in This .github Folder?

```
.github/
├── README.md                    ← You are here!
├── QUICK_START.md              ← Quick command reference (5 min read)
├── INSTRUCTIONS.md             ← Detailed guide for everything (20 min read)
└── workflows/
    └── deploy.yml              ← Auto-deployment script (auto-configured)
```

---

## 🚀 How It Works (Simple Explanation)

1. **You edit content** on GitHub or your computer
2. **You commit changes** (save and upload)
3. **GitHub automatically rebuilds** your website (1-2 minutes)
4. **Website updates live** at your domain
5. **No server management needed** – fully automatic!

---

## ✅ What's Already Done For You

✅ Website created and hosted (GitHub Pages)  
✅ Auto-deployment configured  
✅ 7 blog articles ready to edit  
✅ 12 AI prompts ready to edit  
✅ Contact form ready to setup  
✅ Google Analytics ready to setup  
✅ All instructions written in plain English  

---

## ⏭️ What You Need to Do

**Easy (< 5 minutes):**
- [ ] Read QUICK_START.md
- [ ] Sign up for Formspree (for contact form)
- [ ] Sign up for Google Analytics

**Medium (5-30 minutes):**
- [ ] Add Formspree ID to website
- [ ] Add Google Analytics ID to website
- [ ] Start editing/adding content

**Longer (can take 24-48 hours):**
- [ ] Setup velnoraai.com domain pointing

---

## 💬 Remember

- **You're not alone** – All non-programmer instructions are here
- **Changes are automatic** – No manual deployment steps needed
- **You can always undo** – GitHub keeps version history
- **Ask for help** – Use the Issues section or contact your developer

---
